issues.description: Trigger type is missing context. Should be 'OnPlay' since this is a Main card effect that activates when played.

SearchDeck filter is completely wrong. Effect searches by card type (Blackbeard Pirates) and specific exclusion [My Era...Begins!!], not by cost. Filter should use 'ByCardType' or 'ByName' with exclusion logic, not 'ByCost'.
Missing the 'look at 3 cards from top of deck' mechanic and the 'reveal up to 1' selection limit. Current filter does not capture deck depth or selection quantity constraints.
Missing second action: trash the remaining cards. Effect requires two sequential actions: SearchDeck (add 1 card) AND ForceDiscard/TrashFromHand (trash rest of the 3 looked-at cards).

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Blackbeard Pirates} type card other than [My Era...Begins!!] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.
